name: Chaddesden and Spondon

locations.address:
St Mary's Wharf Enquiry Office,
St Mary's Wharf,
Chester Green,
Derby,

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Chaddesden and Spondon. It belongs to the Derby North policing section.

Chaddesden, situated just north of Derby City is well populated with only one park, Chaddesden Park and some rural areas to the north. Spondon has a shopping precinct, community centre, two churches and several schools, the senior school being West Park Secondary School.
